MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Josette D. Johnson, Esq. of BRYDON HUGO & PARKER (415-808-0300), appearing for defendant Pneumo Abex LLC Successor in interest to Abex Corporation erroneously sued herein as Pneumo-Abex
Anne T. Acuna, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Samuel Leal

RULING:
Defendant Pneumo Abex LLC, SUCESSOR IN INTEREST TO ABEX Corporation's motion for summary judgment. Argued and matter was taken under submission. Each party submitted a proposed order for the Court's consideration. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(220/HEK)

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Oren P. Noah, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff Samuel Leal.
No appearance by Defendant and moving party, Kroeger Equipment & Supply Co.

RULING:
DEFENDANT KROEGER EQUIPMENT & SUPPLY CO.'s MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE. No other appearances and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Kroeger Equipment and Supply Company's motion to transfer venue is denied because the motion was not filed within a reasonable time after Kroeger filed its answer on June 19, 2009. (Weil and Brown, California Practice Guide: Civil Procedure Before Trial (Rutter Group 2009) 3:567). Everything that Mr. Morris reviewed to provide factual support for the motion occurred no later than January 12. 2010 and most occurred prior to August 7, 2009. Kroeger's change of counsel does not excuse the failure to file the motion within a reasonable time after Kroeger filed its answer. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(220/HEK)
